title: MiniGPT induction OV copying circuit v1198
recommendations: VERDICT (induction_ov_is_copying_circuit, status=pass): the OV (value->output) half of the induction-head mechanism in a 2-layer width-64 MiniGPT (n_head=4) on v1196's clean induction task. v1197 verified the QK / prefix-matching half causally; v1198 asks whether the OV circuit COPIES the attended token. status='pass' certifies a VALID measurement -- base inducts 1.000 (>> unigram 0.142), the circuit is classifiable in 88% of trained seeds, the two prongs AGREE, and the verdict is invariant across 100% of the tau grid.

PRONG 1 -- WEIGHT-LEVEL OV COPYING (paired, Gram-confound-aware): the OV map M = W_E W_V W_O W_E^T is diagonal-dominant for induction heads (copy_z 2.52, diag_is_max 0.89) but NOT for the count-matched non-induction L1 control (copy_z -1.66) or prev-token heads (copy_z -0.45). copy_ok=True.

LENS-1 (the tied-embedding Gram confound): the model TIES the unembed to the embedding, so the raw Gram W_E W_E^T is itself diagonal-dominant (copy_z 3.83). The verdict is therefore PAIRED: the controls share the SAME W_E and differ only in W_V/W_O, yet do NOT copy -- so the induction OV's diagonal is learned by W_V/W_O, not inherited from the embedding Gram.

PRONG 2 -- ACTIVATION DIRECT LOGIT ATTRIBUTION (LN-honest): folding each head's residual contribution through the ACTUAL ln_f scale + tied unembed, induction heads add positive logit to the CORRECT answer at inductable positions (DLA_gap 0.566) while the L1 control (-0.043) and prev-token heads (-0.005) do not. dla_ok=True. The two prongs must AGREE (else review).

SCOPE: 2-layer width-64 MiniGPT, n_head=4 (head size 16 -- the substrate v1196 showed RELIABLY learns induction; n_head=8 trains it unreliably), K=20/T=64. The OV-copying mechanism is textbook (Elhage 2021); the NEW bit is the controlled, multi-seed, Gram-confound-aware (paired) + DLA-corroborated demonstration on this model. NOT a claim about LLM induction heads. Together with v1197 (QK) this completes the two-part induction-head mechanism on our own MiniGPT.
